name: Health Check (Skills Router + OpenRouter probes)
_comment: Reference implementation for migrating other stub workflows. Pattern: webhook → HMAC validate (R-02 fail-closed) → respond 200 in parallel → ADR-0003 sign → call Skills Router → two parallel external probes (continueOnFail so a single down service returns 'DOWN' rather than crashing) → format → Telegram reply. Required env vars: HEALTH_CHECK_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SKILLS_ROUTER_URL, SKILLS_ROUTER_SECRET, OPENROUTER_MANAGEMENT_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN. The /credits parsing (data.total_credits - data.total_usage) intentionally mirrors OpenRouterBudgetGate.getCreditsBalance in src/agent/index.ts:254-257 so a single response-shape change is caught in two places.
